description: Compositionblack shoes with synthetic upper, cushioned insole, comfort sockliner and carbon rubber outsoleshoe care1. Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThese exotic black shoes from fila come with a perforated upper to ensure ample breathability for the feet, while the glossy side panels in black and white add that stylish twist. The comfort sockliner protects the ankles from twisting. The lightweight cushioned footbed keeps the feet well relaxed even during strenuous fitness sessions, while the multi-dimensional and multi-structured carbon rubber outsole ensures a firm grip even on hard ground.
